tasks.title: Internal QA: End-to-end LinkedIn campaign test
tasks.description: Run a small test campaign (50-100 connection requests) through Pipeline. Validate lead scraping, enrichment, AI message gen, campaign sending, analytics.

Created MockUnipileService (src/lib/linkedin/mock-unipile-service.ts) that simulates LinkedIn API without real calls - tracks connection requests, messages, profiles, rate limits with deterministic test data. Created test endpoint (src/app/api/test/linkedin-campaign/route.ts) for testing basic flows, connection acceptance, message sequences, rate limiting. Updated StatelessWorkflowExecutor to support mock service injection. Created E2E test suite (tests/e2e/linkedin-campaign.spec.ts) with 30+ test cases covering all scenarios including database integration, variable substitution, and condition branching. Build passes, all code committed to nightly/2026-02-20. Enables safe CI/CD without hitting production LinkedIn API. https://github.com/mattvinall/Pipeline/pull/90

tasks.title: Research Agent Column (Claygent equivalent)
tasks.description:
New enrichment column type: AI Research Agent. User writes a prompt ('find this company's tech stack'), LLM gets search + scrape tools, autonomously researches each row. BYOK model: user brings LLM key + optional Serper key. Pipeline provides self-hosted Spider scraping on backend for free.

Architecture:
- Self-hosted @spider-rs/spider-rs for web scraping ($0 cost)
- Serper/Brave for search queries (BYOK or Pipeline credits)
- User's LLM key (OpenAI/Gemini/Anthropic) for reasoning
- Tool-use pattern: LLM gets search() and scrape() tools

Phases:
1. Spike: Test spider-rs in Pipeline backend, validate scraping works
2. MVP: Single research agent column type with prompt config
3. Polish: Streaming results, progress indicators, retry logic
4. Scale: Add BYOK Spider Cloud/Firecrawl for heavy users

Cost per row: ~$0.002-0.005 (user's keys). Pipeline cost: server CPU only.
tasks.notes: DONE: PR #70 merged. Multi-turn tool-use with BYOK LLM, local scraping via spider-rs, Serper search.

tasks.title: Spike: Test @spider-rs/spider-rs in Pipeline backend
tasks.description:
Install @spider-rs/spider-rs in dmand-v2. Test basic scraping: single page, multi-page crawl, headless Chrome mode. Measure memory/CPU usage. Validate it works in Next.js API routes. Test with 100 URLs concurrently. Document limits and gotchas.

npm i @spider-rs/spider-rs
tasks.notes: →œ… COMPLETE: Package installed, comprehensive test suite run, SpiderLocalService created, results documented in SPIKE_RESULTS.md. GO decision - viable self-hosted scraping solution.

tasks.title: BYOK key management: OpenAI + Gemini + Serper support
tasks.description: Currently only Anthropic keys for AI columns. Extend BYOK to support OpenAI, Gemini, and Serper/Brave API keys. Users need these for the research agent and cheaper LLM options. Store in existing credential system, expose in workspace settings.
tasks.notes: DONE: BYOK built into credential system + research agent. OpenAI/Gemini/Serper supported.

tasks.title: Self-hosted scraping: rate limits + resource controls
tasks.description: Protect backend from abuse when running self-hosted Spider. Per-workspace scrape limits (free tier: 1000/mo, paid: 10k/mo, unlimited with own key). Queue system for bulk jobs. Memory/CPU guardrails. Auto-fallback to BYOK prompt when limits hit. Headless Chrome pool management.

tasks.title: AI Voice Notes: Personalized voice outreach at scale
tasks.description:
Personalized LinkedIn voice notes at scale. User records voice sample once, we clone via ElevenLabs, then generate unique voice notes per prospect with dynamic variables (name, company, topic, etc).

Approach (v1 - Full AI Clone):
- Voice clone setup in Settings (record 30s sample, BYOK ElevenLabs key)
- Template editor with {{first_name}}, {{company}}, {{topic}} variables
- AI resolves template per prospect, generates audio via ElevenLabs TTS
- New workflow node: Voice Note (attaches to LinkedIn message/connection request)
- New enrichment column type for batch generation

Integration:
- ElevenLabs Voice Cloning API (BYOK key)
- Pipeline credits option for users without ElevenLabs key
- Voice preview in template editor before running

Cost per message: ~$0.01-0.03 (ElevenLabs pricing, users key)

Why this wins: No competitor does personalized voice at scale. LinkedIn voice notes get 3-5x response rates vs text. Combined with our AI personalization, this is a massive differentiator.

Future (v2): Hybrid splice approach - record static parts, AI generates only variable segments. Cheaper and more natural.

Leaderboard: FilterTabs (Global/Friends/Country), RankTrending indicators, EnhancedLeaderboardRow with medals, MemberProfileModal. Challenges modal with 3 tabs (Discover/Active/Completed). 10 mock challenges + 20 leaderboard users. Pre-existing TS errors reduced from 134 to 20.

tasks.title: Redesign Phase 5: Achievements + Hero's Journey Foundation (Weeks 5-6)
tasks.description: Gem Collection gallery (shimmer effect, grouped by rarity). Badge achievement grid with unlock animations. Badge unlock celebration modal. Featured Gem on profile. Level-up modal. Skill tree pentagon chart. Character tier display. NEW: Hero Progress screen (emblem timeline, milestone stats). Tier progression detection. Emblem unlock system. Annual metrics tracking.
tasks.notes: DONE (0115cb4): 15 new files ~2,200 lines. GemCollection gallery (grouped by rarity, shimmer), BadgeGrid (5 categories, earned/locked), BadgeUnlockModal, FeaturedGem, LevelUpModal, SkillRadarChart (SVG pentagon), CharacterTierDisplay (6-tier line), EmblemDisplay (3 sizes), EmblemUnlockModal, HeroProgressScreen (journey viz, emblem timeline, milestone stats, next milestone). Profile integration with celebration modals. Achievements store with full CRUD.

tasks.title: Mock Data Seeding: All Stores
tasks.description: Seed comprehensive mock data into all stores for demo readiness. App blocking sessions, achievements (gems/badges/emblems), user profile, leaderboard history, annual metrics, tier progressions, program enrollments.
tasks.notes: DONE: 8 new generators in mockData.ts. All wired into initializeMockData.ts with empty-state guards. Zero new TS errors.

tasks.title: Rich Demo Data: Habits, Progress, Profile, Hero Journey (Gigachad Mode)
tasks.description: Make everything look like user has been crushing it for 2+ months. 15 habits with streaks, 90 days heatmap, 87% completion rate, 21-day streak, 75 Hard (day 42) + No Fap (day 18) active challenges, full gem collection, gigachad avatar, hero progress timeline, skill tree pentagon juiced.
tasks.notes: DONE: 14 habits with streaks, 90-day heatmap at 87% completion, 75 Hard (day 42) + No Fap (day 18), 20 gems (legendary featured), 12/18 badges, gigachad avatar, Advanced tier, skill tree juiced, hero progress with 12 emblems.

tasks.title: Redesign Phase 6: Animation & Interaction Polish (Weeks 6-7)
tasks.description: Gem drop animation (particle fall + shimmer). Confetti on challenge completion. Swipe-to-complete gesture for habits (haptic feedback). Undo functionality (5s window). Milestone notification toasts (7/14/30/60/90/365 streak). Points float-up animation. Level-up particle burst. Scale pulse on active timer. Smooth screen transitions. All animations paired with haptics.

tasks.title: Redesign Phase 7: Notifications + Yearly Recap (Weeks 7-8)
tasks.description: Daily quote rotation. Motivational message library. Streak warning notifications. Rank change notifications. Challenge milestone notifications. Habit reminders. Daily summary notification. NEW: Yearly Recap screen (Spotify Wrapped style). Recap data generation (aggregate all stores). Achievement highlights (top 3-4 moments). Shareable recap image. Monthly activity heatmap.
tasks.notes: Yearly Recap is the viral feature. Shareable = organic growth.

tasks.title: Redesign Phase 8: Analytics & Insights (Weeks 8-9)
tasks.description: Analytics dashboard with period selector (week/month/quarter/year). Trend charts (Victory.js, gradient fills). Heatmap calendar (52-week view). Insight cards ('You focus best at 9-11 AM'). Productive Pattern detection. Comparison cards (you vs peers). Goal progress tracking. Analytics export (PDF report).

tasks.title: Redesign Phase 9: Polish & Testing (Week 9-10)
tasks.description: Performance audit (60fps on mobile). Device testing (iOS/Android/Web). Accessibility audit (WCAG AA). Haptic consistency check. Offline functionality test. Battery optimization. Supabase integration verification. User testing with real users. Bug fixes and refinement.

projects.title: AI Dev Content + Community
projects.description: YouTube channel + Skool community for vibe coders. Teach AI dev tools (Claude Code, Clawdbot, etc), help builders get their first customers. Pipeline is the natural GTM tool. Secondary revenue stream.

tasks.title: YouTube channel setup & branding
tasks.description: Create the channel. Name, banner, profile pic, description, links. Position: 7-year software engineer building SaaS in real time, teaching vibe coders how to ship AND sell.

tasks.title: Content calendar: First 10 videos
tasks.description: AI tools tutorials, Claude Code deep dives, Clawdbot setups, building in public, getting first customers. Each video naturally bridges to 'now get customers' with Pipeline.

tasks.title: Skool community setup
tasks.description: Create Skool community for vibe coders. Monthly subscription. Mix of free content on YouTube + premium community access with deeper tutorials, office hours, peer support.

tasks.title: Bootcamp program design
tasks.description: Paid bootcamp: teach vibe coders how to go from 'I built something' to 'I have paying customers'. Covers GTM strategy, LinkedIn outbound, content marketing, first 10 customers playbook. Uses Pipeline as the tool.

tasks.title: Daily research: AI dev tools intel (automated via heartbeat)
tasks.description: Nightly cron researches Claude Code, Clawdbot, AI coding tools. Tracks: new features, use cases, content competitors, gaps, fresh angles. Saves to memory/content-queue/ai-tools-intel-YYYY-MM-DD.md. Already added to HEARTBEAT.md.
tasks.notes: Added to nightly heartbeat cron. Research banks up automatically so there's a backlog of ideas when Matt is ready to start the channel.

projects.title: Mission Control
projects.description: Hydra's command center. Projects, tasks, memory, swarms, goal tracking.

tasks.title: Rebuild MC with project-based structure
tasks.description: Replace flat kanban with projects > tasks hierarchy. BHAG at top. Project sidebar. Per-project task board.

tasks.title: Memory system improvements
tasks.description: Better MEMORY.md structure, project-specific context files, fix embedding search (needs API key).
tasks.notes: Done. MEMORY.md structured, daily memory files active, session memory search enabled in config, memory flush on compaction.

tasks.title: Swarm system setup
tasks.description: Configure model routing for sub-agents. Opus for planning, Sonnet for copy, Haiku for code execution.

contentCalendar.description: Daily content tracker for LinkedIn, X, YouTube distribution

linkedin.hook: Claude 4.5 just dropped. Here's how I used it to build my GTM system in 3 hours.

x.hook: I spent $10K on LinkedIn tools last year.

team.name: Scout
team.description: Explores codebase, maps dependencies, gathers context before any engineering work.

team.name: Architect
team.description: Creates PRDs, designs architecture. No overengineering. DRY, KISS, YAGNI.

team.name: Builder
team.description: Implements PRDs exactly as specified. Clean code, git branch, commit.

team.name: QA
team.description: Reviews code against spec. Checks edge cases, verifies correctness.

team.name: Researcher
team.description: Researches trending topics, competitor content, viral patterns. Feeds Scriptwriter.

team.name: Scriptwriter
team.description: YouTube scripts, LinkedIn posts, email sequences, X threads. Matt's voice.

team.name: Hook Specialist
team.description: Scroll-stopping hooks, titles, thumbnail concepts, subject lines.

team.name: GTM Strategist
team.description: Positioning, ICP messaging, content calendar, repurposing plans.

team.name: UX Designer
team.description: Reviews UI plans before frontend builds. Information hierarchy, user flow, visual consistency. Knows shadcn/ui + existing patterns. Outputs wireframes + component specs. Catches bad UX in planning, not after shipping.

activityLog.message: Mission Control 2.0: Rebuilt with project-based structure.
[ Mission Control] MC rebuild completed. Swarm config created.
Restructured: Landing Page, YouTube, Email all consolidated under Pipeline project. One startup, one project.
Updated project: 🚀 Pipeline
Updated project: 🚀 Pipeline
Updated project: 🚀 Pipeline
[ Mission Control] "Memory system improvements" → In Progress
[🚀 Pipeline] Landing page: ICP-driven copy rewrite → Done. Changes on feature/29-multi-platform-content branch.
[🚀 Pipeline] ICP scoring requires profile visits at scale - will remove or reframe on landing page.
[🚀 Pipeline] Fixed branch confusion: was on feature/server-side-filtering, switched to feature/29-multi-platform-content.
[🚀 Pipeline] Server-side filtering → Done. Rebased on main, build passes, ready for merge.
[🚀 Pipeline] Landing page table mockup → Done. Interactive enrichment catalog demo replaces static fake UI.
[🚀 Pipeline] Added: Multi-account inbox audit (backlog, high). Added: Beta edge case audit (backlog, critical).
[ Hydra] Setting up nightly proactive work cron. Focus: beta readiness, edge cases, moving the needle.
[🚀 Pipeline] Inbox parallelization → Done. All API calls now run in parallel, first conversation bundled. Commit 267ec44.
[🚀 Pipeline] Beta edge case audit → Done. Fixed app crashes, form race conditions, API timeouts, navigation failures. Commit b8803c4.
[🚀 Pipeline] PR #65 (beta edge cases) merged to main. Branch cleaned up.
[🚀 Pipeline] Octave-style ICP Scoring & Persona Messaging → In Progress. Deploying 10 scout agents for codebase exploration + deep Octave research.
[Pipeline] Old onboarding flow discarded. New critical task: rebuild onboarding from scratch after GTM/persona revamp. Matt testing campaign flows.
[🚀 Pipeline] Created task: GTM Chat: Make it a WOW experience
[🚀 Pipeline] Created task: Stripe -> LinkedIn campaign + newsletter automation
[🚀 Pipeline] Created task: Agent-powered support system
[🚀 Pipeline] Created task: Automated onboarding that converts without hand-holding
[🚀 Pipeline] Created task: Customer health scoring + churn prevention
[🚀 Pipeline] Created task: Revenue / MRR dashboard
[🚀 Pipeline] Created task: YouTube content calendar + scripts (first 10 videos)
[🚀 Pipeline] Created task: LinkedIn content engine (dogfood Pipeline)
[🚀 Pipeline] Created task: Lead magnet + email nurture sequence
[🚀 Pipeline] Created task: GTM Chat: Smart Research Orchestrator (Phase 1)
[🚀 Pipeline] "ICP Scoring & Persona Messaging (Octave-style)" → Done
[ Mission Control] "Memory system improvements" → Done
[🚀 Pipeline] Created task: Research Agent Column (Claygent equivalent)
[🚀 Pipeline] Created task: Spike: Test @spider-rs/spider-rs in Pipeline backend
[🚀 Pipeline] Created task: BYOK key management: OpenAI + Gemini + Serper support
[🚀 Pipeline] Created task: Pipeline Credits system (metered billing)
[🚀 Pipeline] Created task: Self-hosted scraping: rate limits + resource controls
[ Hydra] Beta Readiness Audit → Done. 47 issues found (14 critical). Fixed timeouts, error handling, GTM tools. Report: BETA_AUDIT_FEB1.md
NIGHTLY WORK SESSION: Starting Spider-rs spike (priority #1) + comprehensive beta audit + YouTube content calendar.
[🚀 Pipeline] Spider-rs spike → COMPLETE. Package installed, tests run, SpiderLocalService created, SPIKE_RESULTS.md documented. GO decision for research agent.
[🚀 Pipeline] Starting comprehensive beta readiness audit. Systematic feature sweep: Tables, Campaigns, Inbox, GTM Chat, Integrations, Settings, Content, Auth, Signals.

[🎯 Limitless Rewired] Project added to Mission Control. Conscious Circle app - gamification tracking for coaching graduates. 9-phase UI/UX redesign tasks loaded (Hero's Journey, challenges, animations, yearly recap, analytics). ~8-9 week roadmap.
[🎯 Limitless Rewired] Deployed 7 parallel agents for Phases 1-5 + mock data seeding. Sequential commits to main to avoid conflicts.
[🎯 Limitless Rewired] Phase 2 (Home Screen) done. ActiveChallengesSection, ChallengeCard, ChallengeJoinPrompt, JoinCelebrationModal. Commit 61c3fee.
[🎯 Limitless Rewired] Phase 3 (Focus Screen) done. 6 new components, full tab rewrite with mode selector, live metrics, completion modal with star rating.
[🎯 Limitless Rewired] Phase 1 (Core Foundation) done. Fixed ALL 110 TS errors to 0. Emblem system, rarity tiers, tier badges, Hero Progress screen. Created missing goalsStore.
[🎯 Limitless Rewired] Mock data seeder done. 8 new generators: app blocking, achievements, profile, leaderboard history, annual metrics, tier progressions, programs.
[🎯 Limitless Rewired] Phase 5 (Hero's Journey) done. 15 new files ~2,200 lines. Gem gallery, badge grid, radar chart, character tier display, emblem timeline, hero progress screen. Commit 0115cb4.

[🎯 Limitless Rewired] Phase 4 (Challenges) done. 11 new files. ChallengeDiscovery with search, leaderboard with Global/Friends/Country tabs, GemBadge with 6 rarity glows, MemberProfileModal. TS errors reduced 134->20.

[🎯 Limitless Rewired] ALL 5 PHASES COMPLETE. Deploying final polish agent: rich demo data for habits (15 habits, 90d heatmap), progress (87%, 21d streak), profile (75 Hard + No Fap, gigachad avatar, all gems), hero progress (full timeline).
[🎯 Limitless Rewired (Conscious Circle)] "Redesign Phase 6: Animation & Interaction Polish (Weeks 6-7)" → In Progress
[Pipeline] Created task: AI Voice Notes - personalized voice outreach at scale (ElevenLabs clone + dynamic variables)
[🚀 Pipeline] First live campaign launched! Matt running end-to-end test. Fixing execution bugs as they surface.
[🚀 Pipeline] Variable system overhaul: preserved original column names (no snake_case mangling), fuzzy auto-mapping for field matching, removed auto-capture of unmapped columns.

[🚀 Pipeline] Workflow editor UX fixes: textarea editing broken (cursor jumping, node deletion on backspace). Root cause: auto-save re-render cascade + preview re-rendering on every keystroke. Fixed with debounced preview + ref-based save timer.
[🚀 Pipeline] Fixed: Unipile connection request (identifier→provider_id), SQL SUM cast (text→int before aggregation).
[🚀 Pipeline] Deleted task: Pipeline Credits system (metered billing)
NIGHTLY: Fixed critical provider_id bug in sendMessage/InMail (both executors). Added missing dedup node types + LinkedIn guard types. PR #76.
[🚀 Pipeline] PR #76 merged by Matt. All known campaign execution bugs fixed (provider_id for connections/DMs/InMails, dedup, guards). Live campaign testing continues.
[🚀 Pipeline] Close CRM integration → Done. Full OAuth, service class, DB tables, 9 API routes, hooks, settings page. 4 commits on main.
[🚀 Pipeline] Pipedrive CRM integration → In Progress. Builder agent stamping from Close/Attio pattern.
[🚀 Pipeline] CRM roadmap: Close ✅ → Pipedrive ⏳ → GHL → Remove Salesforce
[🚀 Pipeline] "Email: Choose & configure platform" → Done

[🚀 Pipeline] Nightly: Dead code cleanup. Removed 16 unused files (3,919 lines). PR #87: workflow/enrichment-executor, error-recovery, retry-processor, failed-action-queue, 5 service modules, 4 hooks, types/ai-ark-filters, workspace-intelligence component.
[🚀 Pipeline] MCP Server test suite complete. 65 tools across 10 categories. Unit tests for client + tools + HTTP server. Integration test script ready. Build passing. Awaiting live API testing.
